acceptance_criteria:
1. apply_budget_truncation method
2. Checks against max_total_chars
3. Adds '... (truncated)' suffix
4. Handles char boundary correctly (UTF-8 safe)
5. Does NOT return error for truncation
6. Unit test: long output is truncated
7. Unit test: short output unchanged
8. cargo test passes
title: Implement budget truncation in render pipeline
